# Structure.md (.github/Changelogs)

## Overview
This directory stores historical and current version changelogs and detailed reports for each major update.

## Files
- **changelogs.md** - Primary ledger of all changes, categorized by version.
- **AA*.md** - Detailed reports for each specific change/report code (e.g., AA1, AA2).
- **structure.md** - This overview of the changelog repository.
